Interface PreferencePersistencePort

All Known Implementing Classes:
JpaPreferencePersistenceAdapter, MongoPreferencePersistenceAdapter
public interface PreferencePersistencePort
A PreferencePersistencePort defines the persistence operations needed by the service layer, returning domain Preference objects.
Author:
Heiko Scherrer
